name: Amaranth Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp guar gum (might be unnecessary if Ener-G egg replacer is used)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dough using the specified ingredients.
2. Prepare a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
3. Pour batter onto the hot skillet to form small pancakes.
4. Add banana slices so that they sink partially into the batter but still show on top.
5. Cook until set and golden brown, then turn the pancakes with a spatula.
6. Serve with banana slices facing up for added sweetness and appeal to children.
7. Enjoy warm pancakes topped with bananas.
